recommendations.title: Kites
recommendations.overview: A wounded man searches for his sweetheart in the Mexican desert while on the run from the police, bounty hunters, and others.

recommendations.title: Toy Soldiers
recommendations.overview: After federal agents arrest a drug czar and put him on trial, the cartel leader's vicious son storms a prep school and takes its students hostage. They rebel against the armed intruders and try to take back their academy by any means necessary.

recommendations.title: Mojave
recommendations.overview: A suicidal artist goes into the desert, where he finds his doppelgänger, a homicidal drifter.

recommendations.title: Mine
recommendations.overview: After a failed assassination attempt, a soldier finds himself stranded in the desert. Exposed to the elements, he must survive the dangers of the desert and battle the psychological and physical toll of the treacherous conditions.

recommendations.title: The Gold Rush
recommendations.overview: A gold prospector in Alaska struggles to survive the elements and win the heart of a dance hall girl.

recommendations.title: Pimpinero: Blood and Oil
recommendations.overview: When Juan, a young gasoline smuggler, is forced to work for a mysterious organization in the desert bordering Colombia and Venezuela, his girlfriend Diana embarks on a journey to uncover the secrets that inhabit this no-man’s-land.

recommendations.title: Operation Condor
recommendations.overview: Hired by a Spanish baron, Hong Kong treasure hunter Jackie, a.k.a. "Asian Hawk" and his entourage seek WWII Nazi gold buried in the Sahara Desert.

recommendations.title: K.G.F: Chapter 1
recommendations.overview: A period drama set in the 1970s, KGF follows the story of a fierce rebel who rises against the brutal oppression in Kolar Gold Fields and becomes the symbol of hope to legions of downtrodden people.

recommendations.title: The Treasure of the Sierra Madre
recommendations.overview: Two jobless Americans convince a prospector to travel to the mountains of Mexico with them in search of gold. But the hostile wilderness, local bandits, and greed all get in the way of their journey.

recommendations.title: White Sands
recommendations.overview: A small southwestern town sheriff finds a body in the desert with a suitcase and $500,000. He impersonates the man and stumbles into an FBI investigation.
